entries.source: "Ask Ambedkar about democracy"
entries.value: "લોકશાહી વિશે આંબેડકરને પૂછો"

entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "વધુ સમજાવતા પહેલાં મને પ્રશ્નો પૂછો."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "તમારો જવાબ આપતા પહેલાં મારો જવાબ તપાસો."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "હું પ્રયત્ન કરું પછી મને વધુ કઠિન આવૃત્તિ આપો."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "તેને beginner friendly રાખો."

entries.source: "Meet Ada Lovelace"
entries.value: "Ada Lovelaceને મળો"

entries.source: "Talk to Cleopatra"
entries.value: "Cleopatra સાથે વાત કરો"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "મારી પરીક્ષા, project અથવા રોજિંદા જીવનમાંથી ઉદાહરણો વાપરો."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI પ્રોમ્પ્ટ્સ

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે એક tiny first task.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End સાથે એક recap તમે write yourself.

entries.source: For Talk to a historical person, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: માટે Talk માટે એક historical person, એક ઉપયોગી practice કરો loop is:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: આ mode માટે કામ સરળ છે: પૂછો પ્રશ્નો, challenge ideas, અને શીખો ઇતિહાસ દ્વારા grounded conversations સાથે જાહેર figures માંથી આ past.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Good prompts usually include three things: આ વિષય, તમારું current level, અને આ kindનું મદદ તમે want. તમે do નહીં need perfect wording. તમે માત્ર need enough context માટે આ session માટે begin.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: જો આ response feels too broad, narrow it. પૂછો માટે one ઉદાહરણ, one ગેરસમજ, one તપાસો પ્રશ્ન, અથવા one આગલું પગલું. જો it feels too easy, પૂછો માટે એક challenge. જો it feels too hard, પૂછો માટે એક bridge માંથી શું તમે already know.

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: ઇમર્શન

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: બનાવો આ output વધુ ઉપયોગી

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: inspir પર Talk to a historical personમાંથી ઉપયોગી learning પરિણામો મેળવવા માટે prompt ideas અને પુનરાવર્તિત study loop.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Reading એક AI response છે નહીં આ same તરીકે learning. પછી આ first જવાબ, પૂછો આ mode માટે બનાવો તમે do something સાથે આ idea.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: સંબંધિત શિક્ષણ paths

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request feedback પર આ part કે felt uncertain.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond પહેલાં asking માટે આ solution.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: શરૂ કરો સાથે one સ્પષ્ટ request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: State આ goal માં one sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: અભ્યાસ skills

entries.source: Talk to a historical person prompts and study loop
entries.value: Talk to a historical person prompts અને study loop

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: તે final recap છે important. જ્યારે તમે સમજાવો આ idea back, તમે reveal શું છે solid અને શું છે હજી પણ borrowed માંથી આ AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: સૌથી સારી learning sessions adjustable. આ app separates in-character conversation માંથી short context notes વિશે records અને uncertainty.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Talk to a historical person is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: value માંથી Talk માટે એક historical person છે માટે give આ AI એક learning job, નહીં just એક topic. A topic says શું તમે છે interested in. A learning job says શું kindનું મદદ તમે need. મેળવવાનો સૌથી ઝડપી રસ્તો

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Then add એક constraint કે બનાવે છે આ session વધુ personal:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Try oneનું આ starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: ફેરવો આ mode માં practice કરો

entries.source: Use Talk to a historical person when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Time travel. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Talk to a historical person વાપરો જ્યારે આ કામ માટે યોગ્ય mode હોય. related path જોઈએ તો Time travel અજમાવો. study methods, Socratic learning, ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ, roleplay અને active recall માટે AI learning blog પણ જુઓ.
